channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 19.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian

Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today’s newsletter: Blair obviously right about the source of Keir Starmer’s problems, problems predicted by basically everyone with an interest in policy 2022-4. Troubling for Labour that there is little serious poli...
item.description: Today’s newsletter: Blair obviously right about the source of Keir Starmer’s problems, problems predicted by basically everyone with an interest in policy 2022-4. Troubling for Labour that there is little serious poli...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Blair says Labour needs debate before selecting new leader as he criticises Burnham speech – UK politics live
item.description: Blair says Labour needs debate before selecting new leader as he criticises Burnham speech – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform UK spending on Facebook ads surged before May elections
item.description: Reform UK spending on Facebook ads surged before May elections

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Good to see a minister push back against the content of the Blair piece. Particularly on the incredibly lazy "taxes have risen because of benefits" stuff.
item.description: Good to see a minister push back against the content of the Blair piece. Particularly on the incredibly lazy "taxes have risen because of benefits" stuff.

item.title: LabourList: Tony Blair's essay: Where does he clash with current Labour policy?
item.description: Tony Blair's essay: Where does he clash with current Labour policy?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Blair demands welfare cuts and end of ‘unsustainable’ pension triple lock
item.description: Blair demands welfare cuts and end of ‘unsustainable’ pension triple lock

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Humza Yousaf says Peter Murrell deserves ‘hefty’ sentence for embezzlement
item.description: Humza Yousaf says Peter Murrell deserves ‘hefty’ sentence for embezzlement

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour must put policy first, politics second, Tony Blair says
item.description: Labour must put policy first, politics second, Tony Blair says

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Where do the Greens go now? I interviewed @meadwaj.bsky.social on a Burnham premiership, his new think tank Verdant, public ownership and how Britain adapts to becoming a hot country. www.arguably.uk/p/what-do-th...
